name: jumpserver-windows-web-wrapper
description: Electron MVP wrapper for JumpServer community Windows web sessions.

scripts.check: node --check src/main/main.js && node --check src/main/config-store.js && node --check src/main/logger.js && node --check src/main/url-rules.js && node --check src/main/session-shortcuts.js && node --check src/preload/home-preload.js && node --check src/preload/session-preload.js && node --check src/renderer/home.js
